name: Community Phone Company
long_description: Community Phone is building the peace-of-mind layer for aging in America. Our phone works out of the box with no setup required, our AI-powered check-in calls surface how seniors are really doing, and our family app replaces daily anxiety with genuine safety and connection. There are 55 million Americans over 65 living at home. We are building the product their families have needed for years. We are well into 8-figure ARR, pacing to 9 figures, backed by Y Combinator, YC Continuity, and SNR.vc.
one_liner: The phone that gives families peace of mind about aging parents
